title: rubus gongshanensis
intro: Rubus gongshanensis, also known as the Gongshan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus gongshanensis include lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus gongshanensis can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
